function M(M)return r[M-(-767668+793673)]end do local M=table.concat local K=string.char local y=string.sub local o=table.insert local L=r local m=math.floor local U=type local O=string.len for r=601979-601978,#L,-255479-(-255480)do local Z=L[r]if U(Z)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local U=O(Z)local R={}local D=790835-790834 local Q=897504+-897504 local z=-382182-(-382182)while D<=U do local r=y(Z,D,D)local M=v[r]if M then Q=Q+M*(951192-951128)^((-938245+938248)-z)z=z+(847609-847608)if z==-484609+484613 end return(function(r,y,v,o,L,m,U,b,Z,e,t,h,z,E,x,K,S,Y,R,D,O,Q,c)O,b,E,Z,h,Q,K,e,z,c,t,S,x,R,Y,D={},function(r,M)local y=Q(M)local v=function(v,o,L,m,U)return K(r,{v;o;L;m,U},M,y)end return v
